evidence.source_cells: Human embryonic stem cells and induced pluripotent stem cells were maintained on Matrigel (BD Biosciences) in mTesR1 media without feeders.
evidence.matrix: spheroids were embedded in Matrigel (BD Bioscience) containing 500ng/mL R-Spondin1
evidence.base_media: media (Advanced DMEM/F12 (Invitrogen) supplemented with L-Glutamine, 10 μM Hepes, N2 supplement (R&D Systems), B27 supplement (Invitrogen), and Pen/Strep containing growth factors was overlaid and replaced every 4 days.
evidence.Activin A: Cells were treated with ActivinA (100ng/mL) for three consecutive days in RPMI 1640 media (Invitrogen)
evidence.FGF4: DE cells were incubated in 2% dFBS-DMEM/F12 with 500ng/ml FGF4 and 500ng/ml Wnt3a (R&D Systems) for up to 4 days.
evidence.Wnt3a: DE cells were incubated in 2% dFBS-DMEM/F12 with 500ng/ml FGF4 and 500ng/ml Wnt3a (R&D Systems) for up to 4 days.
evidence.R-Spondin1: spheroids were embedded in Matrigel (BD Bioscience) containing 500ng/mL R-Spondin1 ( R&D Systems), 100ng/mL Noggin (R&D Systems) and 50ng/mL EGF (R&D Systems).
evidence.Noggin: containing 500ng/mL R-Spondin1 ( R&D Systems), 100ng/mL Noggin (R&D Systems) and 50ng/mL EGF (R&D Systems).
evidence.HyClone defined FBS (dFBS): with increasing concentrations of 0%, 0.2%, 2% HyClone defined FBS (dFBS) (Thermo Scientific).
evidence.L-Glutamine: supplemented with L-Glutamine, 10 μM Hepes, N2 supplement (R&D Systems), B27 supplement (Invitrogen), and Pen/Strep
evidence.Hepes: supplemented with L-Glutamine, 10 μM Hepes, N2 supplement (R&D Systems), B27 supplement (Invitrogen), and Pen/Strep
evidence.N2 supplement: N2 supplement (R&D Systems), B27 supplement (Invitrogen), and Pen/Strep
evidence.Pen/Strep: B27 supplement (Invitrogen), and Pen/Strep containing growth factors was overlaid and replaced every 4 days.

notes: Source cells: methods state BOTH human ESC and iPSC were used ('Human embryonic stem cells and induced pluripotent stem cells'); cell_type set to ESC but iPSC is equally applicable per this paper. The schema allows only one value, so this is a simplification. Base_media is ambiguous across stages: maintenance used mTesR1; DE used RPMI 1640; hindgut used DMEM/F12; the 3D organoid culture (the organoid stage) used Advanced DMEM/F12 — annotated Advanced DMEM/F12 as the organoid-stage base media. Concentrations: FGF4 and Wnt3a stated as 500ng/ml in methods (Fig 1 caption mentions 50 and 500ng dose range, but the methods state 500); annotated 500. ActivinA 100ng/mL stated. R-Spondin1 500, Noggin 100, EGF 50 ng/mL all stated in methods. dFBS used as 0/0.2/2% gradient during DE and 2% during hindgut — bucketed as a supplement (viability/serum), not a signaling factor. Source omits any explicit Y-27632/ROCK inhibitor, CHIR99021, SB431542, nicotinamide, or N-acetylcysteine. Detailed full protocol is in external supplementary files (not fetched).
